author: dashboard-bootstrap
content:
Fix #603: add --permission-mode <mode> CLI flag to kickoff run/launch.

CLI: new flag on KickoffCommands::{Run,Launch} with PossibleValuesParser limiting to claude's set (acceptEdits/auto/bypassPermissions/default/dontAsk/plan), conflicts_with skip_permissions.

Plumbing: types.rs KickoffOpts.permission_mode, threaded through mod.rs (Run/Launch destructure + dispatch_launch + 3 KickoffOpts construction sites), run.rs to launch_local, and launch.rs build_agent_command resolution. Also updated swarm/lifecycle.rs and sentinel/engine.rs KickoffOpts builders.

Resolution in build_agent_command: permission_mode (when non-empty) wins over skip_permissions; empty string falls back to skip_permissions resolution; neither = no flag.

Tests: 2878 pass (+3 new: with_permission_mode_auto, permission_mode_wins_over_skip_permissions, empty_permission_mode_treated_as_none). Clippy strict clean, fmt clean.
